zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Walkenden於1502年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾時，她的父親Henry Walkenden17歲，母親Eleanor Walkenden33歲。她於1519年與Thomas Allyn Teague在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾多尼結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1600年8月24日在她的家鄉享年98歲。

nameMeanings.name: Walkenden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Walkden
meanings: English: habitational name from Walkden in Worsley (Lancashire). The placename probably derives from an Old English personal name, Walca, + Old English denu ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Walkenden was born in 1502, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry Walkenden, was 17 and her mother, Eleanor Walkenden, was 33. She married Thomas Allyn Teague in 1519, in Dorney, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 24 August 1600, in her hometown, at the age of 98.

Elle a épousé Thomas Allyn Teague en 1519, à Dorney, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 août 1600, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 98 ans.

ko.St Chad,Shrewsbury,Shropshire,England: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이 슈레w스버이 스트 채드
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Walkenden(이)가 1502년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Walkenden(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Walkenden(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 돈이에서 Thomas Allyn Teague(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1600년 8월 24일 그녀의 고향에서 98세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.St Chad,Shrewsbury,Shropshire,England: шрюсбури ст чэд, шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Walkenden родилась в 1502 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry Walkenden было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Walkenden, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Allyn Teague в 1519 г. в местности дорни, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 24 августа 1600 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 98 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Walkenden nació en 1502, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Walkenden, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Eleanor Walkenden, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Thomas Allyn Teague en 1519, en Dorney, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de agosto de 1600, en su pueblo, a la edad de 98 años.
